wiki.summary: "claws" is the second single from Charli XCX’s 2020 quarantine project how i'm feeling now. The track was first teased by Charli with lyrics she posted to her Twitter on April 8, 2020. She later played a vocal demo of the track on Instagram Live session on April 10, 2020, also revealing that Dylan Brady of [artists]100 gecs produced the track. Read more on Last.fm.
